data.title: XRP News Today: XRP Slides 2% Amid Souring Sentiment
data.description: Key Takeaways:XRP price drops 3%, lagging behind the broader crypto marketNegative social sentiment reaches highs, historically a contrarian signalTechnical breakdown below $1.88–$1.90 weakens short-term structureImmediate Price Move And ETF ActivityXRP declined 2.4% over the past 24 hours, underperforming the broader crypto market at -2.6%. The token fell below the key $1.90 area, accelerating downside momentum during thin holiday liquidity.Despite the price drop, XRP ETF products recorded $43.9 million in daily inflows, extending an uninterrupted streak since launch. Cumulative net inflows now exceed $1.1 billion, highlighting steady positioning by early allocators.Social Sentiment Hits Extreme Fear LevelsMarket data shows extreme negative sentiment dominating XRP-related discussions. According to Santiment, metrics indicate bearish social chatter at levels last seen in November this year, a period that preceded a sharp rebound.Retail-driven fear has intensified even as the XRP Ledger has processed over 4 billion transactions. Historically, such sentiment extremes often coincide with exhaustion in selling pressure, though near-term confidence remains low. Technical Structure Weakens Below Key LevelsFrom a technical standpoint, XRP price breached the 78.6% Fibonacci retracement at $1.88, a critical support zone. Short-term trend references now sit above price, including the 10-day EMA at 1.919 and 30-day SMA at 2.043, reinforcing bearish control.Momentum indicators remain fragile, with RSI near 41, offering no oversold relief. Longer-term averages, such as the 50-day EMA at 2.123 and 200-day EMA at 2.404, underline the depth of the current downtrend. Broader Market Context And On-Chain SignalsThe decline aligns with sector-wide altcoin pressure as Bitcoin dominance rose to 59%, pulling capital toward BTC. On-chain data also shows reduced activity, with new XRPL addresses averaging 3,440. Meanwhile, the value held by large holders has eased to roughly $104 billion, suggesting cautious risk management among whales. XRP Outlook: Key Levels And Catalysts To WatchThe near-term XRP forecast hinges on sentiment stabilization and broader market direction. Analysts are watching $1.88 as a critical level, with downside risk toward $1.70–$1.81 if weakness persists.On the upside, a recovery above $1.95 could ease technical pressure and test sentiment exhaustion. For now, the XRP update reflects a market split between fearful retail positioning and steady institutional interest through ETFs.

data.title: Hassett: The Fed is far behind the times on the issue of interest rate cuts.
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett stated that the Federal Reserve is far behind the times in cutting interest rates, and that the GDP data is an excellent Christmas gift to the American people. He added that US economic data shows artificial intelligence productivity is booming, and if GDP growth remains around 4%, monthly job creation will recover to 100,000 to 150,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve Considers Workforce Reduction Amid Political Pressure
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, The Washington Post reported that in the spring of 2025, the Federal Reserve's 12 regional reserve bank presidents convened a closed-door meeting in Philadelphia to discuss a sensitive issue: the potential reduction of the Federal Reserve's workforce by approximately 10%. This consideration was in response to U.S. President Donald Trump's administration's initiative to downsize the federal government.

Some regional presidents expressed opposition, fearing that such cuts could impair the Federal Reserve's operational capabilities. However, after extensive discussions, the Federal Reserve leadership decided to partially comply with certain demands from the Trump administration to alleviate political pressure. This approach aimed to better safeguard the central bank's independence in crucial decision-making and avoid direct confrontation.

Subsequently, in May 2025, Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell issued an internal memorandum to employees, announcing plans to reduce the overall workforce by about 10% over the coming years, including through the end of 2027. This reduction would decrease the number of employees from approximately 24,000 to around 22,000.

data.title: Coinbase now supports deposits and withdrawals of SOL via the Base network.
data.description: Coinbase's official documentation reveals that the exchange now supports SOL deposits and withdrawals via the Base network. Users can use SOL as an ERC20 token on the Base network, enabling seamless interaction with the Solana network. Currently, SOL deposit and withdrawal functionality on the Base network is not available to users in Japan, Germany, Canada, the UK, Singapore, and other regions.

data.title: The European Central Bank plans to set a cap on the holdings of digital euros.
data.description: The European Council announced its support for the European Central Bank's plans to explore an official digital currency, calling it a tool for the evolution of money and financial inclusion. However, the council stated that the ECB needs to set limits on the total value that can be held simultaneously in online accounts and digital wallets to "prevent the digital euro from being used as a store of value," thereby preventing any impact on financial stability. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Federal Reserve's Strategic Restraint Amid Trump Administration Tensions
data.description: According to Odaily, The Washington Post has revealed that during a closed-door meeting in Philadelphia this spring, Federal Reserve regional presidents opted for strategic restraint to avoid conflicts with the Trump administration. This approach has since guided the institution's response to multiple criticisms from U.S. President Donald Trump. The Washington Post confirmed the meeting details, highlighting that the 112-year-old institution's leadership chose to defend its rate-setting independence by avoiding public confrontations and absorbing some impacts without retaliating openly. Analysts suggest that if the Federal Reserve had not adjusted certain policies or had publicly opposed the President's calls for rate cuts, the situation could have worsened, potentially leading Trump to attempt the dismissal of more current board members, including Chairman Jerome Powell.

data.title: ETH Strategy: Currently holds 11,778 ETH, worth approximately $34.4 million.
data.description: Ethereum Strategy, an Ethereum treasury protocol, released updated operational data on the X platform, disclosing that the company holds 11,778 ETH, with a total ETH reserve of $34.4 million, a leverage ratio of 1.10x, a revised total asset value (mGAV) of 0.88x, and has earned $1.7 million in ETH since its inception, representing a return of +5.0%.

data.title: Solana News Today: SOL Slides 3% Amid Technical Breakdown
data.description: Key Takeaways:Solana price falls 3%, underperforming the broader crypto marketBitcoin dominance at 59.% drives capital rotation away from altcoinsTechnical breakdown below key averages weakens near-term confidence Immediate Price Move And Technical RejectionSOL declined 3% in the past 24 hours, falling more than the broader market’s negative 2.45% move. The drop followed a rejection near the 30-day simple moving average at 132.66, reinforcing near-term selling pressure.According to technical data, SOL price now trades below all major moving averages. Short-term references like the 10-day EMA at 126.32 and 20-day EMA at 129.52 highlight fading bullish momentum after the recent rebound attempt.Source: TradingView Bitcoin Dominance And Altcoin WeaknessThe broader environment remains challenging for altcoins. Bitcoin dominance rose to 59%, a 30-day high, signaling capital rotation toward BTC. The Altcoin Season Index at 16 reflects one of the weakest readings since April 2025.Market sentiment remains cautious, with the Fear & Greed Index at 29. Rising derivatives exposure, with $798.9 billion in open interest, has increased volatility across digital assets, especially in high-beta tokens like Solana. Whale Activity And Derivatives PressureOn-chain data shows a coordinated derivatives move by a large trader, opening $18.79 million in SOL short positions alongside larger BTC and ETH positions. This activity coincided with a 45% surge in Solana derivatives volume to $3.43 billion.Negative funding rates near -0.00326% discouraged leveraged long exposure. With low liquidity and a turnover ratio near 4.69%, the market absorbed the pressure poorly, amplifying the downside move. Strong Inflows Show Room for OptimismHowever, SOL's inflows paint a more optimistic picture. Last week, amid a nearly $1B cumulative outflow in crypto ETPs led by Ethereum, SOL and XRP bucked the bearish trend and instead registered inflows of $48.5M and $62.9M respectively. Data on daily SOL ETF inflows also presents a strong case for confidence in SOL to regain lost ground, with ETFs from Vaneck and Fidelity posting positive inflows.Source: SoSoValue Key Levels And Near-Term OutlookFrom a technical perspective, Solana price broke below the 38.2% Fibonacci level at 135.49 and failed to reclaim short-term averages. The daily RSI near 41 suggests room for further downside before exhaustion signals appear.On the upside, resistance levels present themselves at $126.8 and $128.5, where short-term moving averages and Fibonacci resistance meet. A confirmed breakout above this zone could lead to $132.Now, traders are monitoring the $117.32 area, the 2025 swing low, as a critical reference. Any stabilization may depend on Bitcoin holding key levels and whether renewed institutional interest, including rising BTC ETF inflows, improves broader market confidence.

data.title: Fasanara Capital's Recent Ethereum Acquisition and Strategy
data.description: According to TechFlow, Fasanara Capital has made significant moves in the cryptocurrency market over the past two days. The firm acquired 6,569 ETH, valued at $19.72 million, and deposited them into Morpho. Subsequently, Fasanara Capital borrowed $13 million USDC to purchase additional ETH. This strategic maneuver highlights the company's active engagement in the crypto space, leveraging decentralized finance platforms for asset acquisition.

data.title: The Washington Post reveals Federal Reserve secrets: Closed-door meeting decides to compromise with Trump
data.description: The Washington Post exclusively reported that during a closed-door meeting in Philadelphia this spring, Federal Reserve regional presidents opted for strategic restraint to avoid conflict with the Trump administration. This strategy has since guided the Fed's response to President Trump's repeated attacks on the institution. The Washington Post has verified the details of the meeting, stating that the leadership of this 112-year-old institution chose to defend its independence in setting interest rates by avoiding public confrontation with Trump, absorbing some of the impact, and refraining from public retaliation. Analysts point out that if the Fed had not adjusted certain policies or publicly countered the president's calls for rate cuts, its situation might have been much worse; Trump could have potentially attempted to fire more current governors, including Powell.

data.title: Crypto Whale Faces Significant Losses in BTC, ETH, and SOL Positions
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, monitoring by HyperInsight reveals that a prominent crypto whale, known as BTC OG, is experiencing substantial losses on long positions totaling $716 million in Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL). The overall unrealized loss has expanded to $55 million.

The current positions include a long position of $592 million in Ethereum, with an entry price of $3,147.39, resulting in an unrealized loss of $46.36 million. Additionally, there is a long position of $87 million in Bitcoin, with an entry price of $91,506.7, leading to an unrealized loss of $4.45 million. Lastly, the whale holds a long position of $37 million in Solana, with an entry price of $135.2, incurring an unrealized loss of $3.73 million.
